title: Assigned by me
excerpt:
hello, 
can i see all of the items that are assigned by me to other users in different boards or workspaces in one space?

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello,
can i see all of the items that are assigned by me to other users in different boards or workspaces in one space?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: No, there’s no ‘native’ way to do that. If that’s something you need, you could set up automations where if you create an item on a board, that same item is created on a central board?

posts.author: Maya.patton (Maya)
posts.cookedHtml: What about the “My Work” section? doesn’t that space hold all items assigned to you?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Yea, it shows item assigned ‘to you’, but she’s looking to see items assigned ‘by her’ to other people
